zh.lifeSummary: 當Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET於大約1042年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊時，他的父親Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU24歲，母親Adelice DU QUEMENET-?28歲。他和Orwen de Cornouaille至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1103年在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET于大约1042年出生在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊时，他的父亲Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU24岁，母亲Adelice DU QUEMENET-?28岁。他和Orwen de Cornouaille至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1103年在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET was born about 1042, in Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Brittany, France, his father, Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU, was 24 and his mother, Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Orwen de Cornouaille. He died in 1103, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET est né environ 1042, à Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Orwen de Cornouaille. Il est décédé en 1103, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET um 1042 in Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU 24 und seine Mutter Adelice DU QUEMENET-? 28. Er hatte mit Orwen de Cornouaille mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1103 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET è nato il circa 1042 nel Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Orwen de Cornouaille. Morì nel 1103, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENETが約1042年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアサイント-プオル-デ-ルeオンで生まれた時，父Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOUは24歳，母Adelice DU QUEMENET-?は28歳であった。彼はOrwen de Cornouailleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1103年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET(이)가 대략 1042년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 세인트-포-데-e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelice DU QUEMENET-?(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Orwen de Cornouaille(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1103년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Orwen de Cornouaille. Ele faleceu em 1103, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET родился около 1042 г. в местности сеинт-пол-де-лeон, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Orwen de Cornouaille. Он умер в 1103 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET nació aproximadamente 1042, en Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain DE LEON-DE COUEZOU, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adelice DU QUEMENET-?, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Orwen de Cornouaille. Murió en 1103, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
